conversation.text: hey Just bumping this in case it got buried. no stress if the timing's off
Oh hey, sorry I've been so busy! Still interested though.
haha no worries at all, everyone's run off their feet lately. where did we get to?
We were talking about the price for the clinic setup.

ah yeah of course. so for a clinic it's usually under a month of ad spend, 50/50 split|||honestly best to just grab a time with Louis to get a proper figure. he can show you how the 24/7 booking setup works too. want me to send the link?
